title: Renewal-readiness one-pager — the FleetOps house style
content:
Renewal Brief — Northgate Distribution (illustrative — not a seeded book account)
Renewal date: [date] | Current ARR: [amount] | Tier: Professional

Health summary: green for the full contract term; zero unresolved cases; one champion (Operations Director) engaged throughout, reply latency steady at 4-6 hours all year.

Adoption evidence: Live Map at 96% of licensed assets (up from 71% at kickoff); Maintenance Radar active with 11 of 14 predictive alerts acted on. Route Optimizer remains unadopted — the one open gap, already surfaced in this quarter's QBR with a training play assigned.

Commercial context: no expansion conversation is scoped for this renewal — usage growth has been steady but not yet at the threshold FleetOps' own expansion playbook calls for (60+ consecutive days of sustained growth without a corresponding entitlement increase). This is a flat renewal, not an expansion motion, and the brief says so rather than reaching for an upsell that the evidence doesn't support.

Risk to the renewal: none identified from health, usage, or relationship signals. The unadopted Route Optimizer module is a satisfaction risk if left unaddressed into the next term, not a renewal risk for this cycle.

Recommended CSM action before renewal: close the Route Optimizer training gap so the account enters its next term using its full entitled capability set, not partial. No commercial terms are proposed in this brief — pricing and contract language route to the account's Account Executive.
